title: zanthoxylum haitiense
intro: Zanthoxylum haitiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Haitian prickly ash or Haitian pepperbush. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Zanthoxylum haitiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
